servers.name: Next.js Dev Server (Turbopack)
servers.description: Main Next.js development server with hot reload

servers.name: Next.js Production Build
servers.description: Build the app for production (outputs to .next/)

servers.name: Next.js Production Server
servers.description: Serve the production build locally (requires build first)

servers.name: ESLint Linter
servers.description: Run ESLint across the entire project

notes: next-dev: Primary server for local development. Uses Next.js 16.2.1 with Turbopack.
next-start: Requires 'next-build' to run first. Simulates production environment.
Port 3000 is preferred; Next.js auto-switches to 3001 if 3000 is occupied.
Firebase env vars must be set in .env.local before starting any server.
